meta.title: Te kēmu kupu o ia rā
meta.description: Matapakihia te kupu huna i roto i ngā ngana e 6 (iti iho rānei). He pakanga hou ia rā, ia rā!
meta.keywords: māori, pakanga, kupu, kēmu, ipurangi, matapaki, ia rā

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Maori. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Maori as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Maori. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Maori. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Maori. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: I oti au te Wordle o tēnei rā i ngā ngana {n}. Ka taea e koe te hinga i ahau?
text.share_challenge_lose: Kāore au i te Wordle o tēnei rā. Ka taea e koe?
text.hard_mode_position: Aratau uaua: me noho {letter} ki te tūranga {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Aratau uaua: me whai te matapaki i te {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!

ui.word_info_desc: Whakamārama me te toi AI i muri i te kēmu
ui.install_app_desc: Tākaro tuimotu me te tohu taupānga
ui.play_more_languages: Tākaro atu anō ngā reo kia kite i ō tatauranga whānui!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Tākaro Wordle ia rā pēnei i te taupānga
ui.no_games_yet: Kāore anō koe kia tākaro. Kōwhiria he reo ki te tīmata!
ui.easy_desc: Ka whakaaetia ngā kupu katoa, ahakoa kāore i te papakupu
ui.normal_desc: Me kupu tika ngā matapaki mai i te papakupu
ui.hard_desc: Me whakamahi ngā tohutohu kua kitea i ngā matapaki e whai ake ana
ui.high_contrast_desc: Tae hoa mō te kūare tae
ui.todays_word_reveal: Te kupu o tēnei rā — Tākaro kia kite!
ui.future_word: Kāore anō tēnei kupu kia tākaro. Hoki mai ā muri!
ui.first_to_play: Tuatahi ki te tākaro i tēnei rā!
ui.daily_words_counting: kupu ia rā, ā, kei te piki tonu
ui.difficulty_locked: Kāore e taea te huri i te taumaha i muri i te matapaki
